query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  a.leadId,
  l.nome as leadNome,
  a.dataAgendamento,
  a.horaAgendamento,
  a.status,
  a.createdAt,
  u.nome as corretorNome
FROM agendamentos a
LEFT JOIN leads l ON a.leadId = l.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON a.corretorId = u.id
WHERE a.status IN ('pendente', 'confirmado')
  AND (a.leadId, a.dataAgendamento, a.horaAgendamento) IN (
    SELECT leadId, dataAgendamento, horaAgendamento
    FROM agendamentos
    WHERE status IN ('pendente', 'confirmado')
    GROUP BY leadId, dataAgendamento, horaAgendamento
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  )
ORDER BY a.leadId, a.dataAgendamento, a.horaAgendamento, a.id;
